productDisplayName: Nike Men Dunk High Blue Sports Shoes
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk High has a heel counter that provides ample structural support, protecting the ankle from sprains and injuries while running. Coupled with an uber cool look is its superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk High a huge favourite, both on the track and off it. If you enjoy donning that sporty look, simply pair the Dunk High with jeans and casual tees.UpperSynthetic and textile upper for maximum durabilityHigh ankle for better support to the lower legPadded tongue, collar and textile lined sockliner for a snug FitLace-up system for a snug, customised fitPerforations on the toebox for ample ventilationMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionMildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleFlexible multi-directional rubber outsole for durabilitySemi-circular grooved forefoot with pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injuryshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
